attacking_style: Capable of bold solo attacks from distance, evidenced by descending a Cat 1 climb with 1:15 gap and holding until 3.4km to go. Not a traditional finisher despite leadout work.
team_tactics: Functions effectively as a lone leadout rider, delivering sprint wins without full train support. Minimalist approach prioritizing final positioning over extended high-tempo trains.
terrain_preference: Technical descents where he can exploit gaps built on climbs. Effective on sprint stages requiring simplified leadout execution rather than complex positioning battles.
vulnerability: Lacks sustained power to finish solo efforts against GC-level riders on final climbs. Requires team structure that doesn't demand extended tempo-setting before leadout duties.
key_patterns: Successfully executes solo leadout duties, delivering stage wins without traditional sprint train support (2 observations).
Attempts long-range solo moves on mountainous stages, holding significant time gaps deep into finales (2 observations).
Demonstrates versatility between breakaway aggression and sprint support roles across Grand Tours (2 observations).
form_trajectory: positive: Evolved from ambitious breakaway rider (2021) to proven leadout specialist capable of winning from minimal team support (2023).
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
